stories.headline: 'Red lines have been crossed': Gulf states weigh response to Iranian strikes
stories.description: Iranian strikes tarnish Gulf states' safe image, reports the BBC.

stories.headline: Iranians to bid farewell to Khamenei as Israel threatens to kill successor
stories.description: Israel’s defence minister says next leader ‘target for assassination’ as Iranians prepare to mourn Khamenei in Tehran.

stories.headline: How long can Israel sustain a military conflict with Iran?
stories.description: Public support for Israel’s war effort contrasts with doubts over its long-term military and economic sustainability.

stories.headline: Israeli forces bomb hotel in Beirut, residential building in Lebanon’s east
stories.description: Israel hits Comfort Hotel in greater Beirut without warning; more residents displaced across Lebanon.

stories.headline: Trump belittles Starmer with 'no Churchill' jibe but can the special relationship recover?
stories.description: The remarks came amid a row over the refusal to permit the use of UK bases for the initial US-Israel strikes.
